title: Cocktail Making Set, Cocktail Shaker Set 750ml Stainless Steel Bar Tool Set Bartender Kit with Bamboo Display Stand for Home & Bar (Black Silver - 17PCS)
features: Make Drinks Professional Tool Set: This cocktail shaker set contains most essential bartending tools needed for start mixing drinks, 25 oz martini shaker, double jigger, bar spoon, muddler, strainer, ice tongs, liquor pourers, corkscrew, Recipes and stand

Top Quality: The martini shaker cocktail set made of thickened 18/8 stainless steel with surface polishing which can protect itself from rust for lifetime and remain new and shiny after years of shaking, the bar tools set is leak-proof and dishwasher safe

Perfect Decoration: The bartenders comes with an elegant bamboo stand, keep your bar kit set organized and accessible easily, you will find it’s a beautiful landscape wherever it is placed, you can easily bring an immersive mixing experience anywhere

Ideal Gift for Cocktail Lovers: Beautiful bar cart accessories, bamboo holder and cocktail recipes packed together with a pretty gift case, giving a plenty of inspiration to get started, even a beginner! A pretty gift for lover, family, friends, colleagues

Home or Party Choice: A good choice to entertain your guest and friend at home or party, raise the atmosphere up with shaking and shaking. The cocktail mixing set great for birthday, wedding, housewarming, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Valentine or business
description: Product Description Whether you're an amateur bartender or a professional cocktail mixing guru, whether you’re setting up a bar at home or at work, show off your gorgeous cocktail kit with the unique bamboo storage rack.
